description: Style NoteDesigned to capture the spirit of the surfer girl, this pair of flip flops from roxy (a warm weather essential) adds a pop of colour into your spring wardrobe. We can't think of enough ways you can wear this - with your shorts and top summer staples or with that retro themed bikini you just splurged in. The cushioned EVA midsole offers an all-day-massage feel to your sunburnt feet while you sip a virgin pinacolada by the seaside! Product DetailsPink flip flops with rubber thong straps that have brandingSoft footbed with heart shaped lugs all overPatterned grooves all over the outsole Material and Care RubberWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust
